headline: FactSet Research Systems (FDS) Faces A Valuation Test As Q3 Earnings Reaffirm The Outlook
summary: FactSet Research Systems Q3 earnings and guidance snapshot FactSet Research Systems (FDS) drew fresh investor attention after reporting third quarter results that paired higher sales with softer earnings, reaffirmed full year guidance, and disclosed significant progress on its ongoing share repurchase program.
